UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User profile metadata stored per registered UID.

usernameLower.description: Lowercase representation of the username handle for uniqueness query matching.

PersonalizationProfile.title: PersonalizationProfile
PersonalizationProfile.description: User preferences, taste vectors, interaction logs, and metadata for recommendations.

recentInteractions.description: Chronological rolling logs of last 20 user actions.

preferences.description: Custom model weighting priorities or preferences.

WatchlistItem.title: WatchlistItem
WatchlistItem.description: An entry keeping track of a user's watchlist state.

userId.description: The UID of the owning user.

titleId.description: The unique reference ID for the movie/series/anime.

title.description: Name of the movie, show, or anime.

posterUrl.description: Image link to the title poster.

users/{userId}.description: Stores core registered user credentials and references.

users/{userId}/settings/{docId}.description: Saves user profile, privacy boundaries, playback settings, and notification preferences.

users/{userId}/watchlist/{itemId}.description: Custom watch status records isolated under the user's document.

users/{userId}/ratings/{ratingId}.description: Critiques, ratings, and reviews given by a specific user.

users/{userId}/personalization/{docId}.description: Stores personalization logs, recommendation vectors and advanced research parameters.
